title: Squirrel Removal in Flatbush, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Flatbush, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from attics & walls. Licensed experts serving Victorian homes & multi-family buildings. Call now!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Flatbush, Brooklyn, where tree-lined streets and historic Victorian homes provide ideal nesting opportunities in attics, soffits, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Flatbush, from the bustling Flatbush Avenue corridor to the quiet residential blocks near Prospect Park. Our humane removal process ensures squirrels are safely extracted and prevented from returning to your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Flatbush homeowners and property managers for years with specialized knowledge of Brooklyn's unique pest challenges. Our licensed technicians understand the specific construction styles of Flatbush homes—from pre-war brownstones to multi-family dwellings—and use proven exclusion methods to protect your property while complying with all NYC wildlife regulations.
localContext: Flatbush's mature tree canopy and proximity to Prospect Park create an environment where squirrel populations thrive, often leading to infestations in the neighborhood's characteristic wood-frame houses and attached brick buildings. The area's mix of single-family homes along Albemarle Road, East 21st Street, and near Brooklyn College frequently experience squirrel activity, especially during nesting seasons in spring and fall.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Flatbush typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. Factors like attic size, building height, and damage repair can affect the final cost. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Flatbush homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Flatbush homes through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in fascia boards, and openings where utility lines enter the building. The area's older Victorian and pre-war homes often have deteriorated wood trim that squirrels can easily chew through. They're particularly attracted to warm attics for nesting during colder months.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in NYC humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in accordance with New York State wildlife regulations. We use live traps when necessary and focus primarily on exclusion techniques that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. We never use poisons or inhumane trapping methods, and we ensure no young are separated from mothers during nesting season.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Flatbush property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Flatbush service calls within 24-48 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-10 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Complete exclusion work—sealing all entry points—is performed immediately after removal to prevent re-entry. We also offer emergency same-day service for severe cases.
